title: hieracium peleterianum subsp. tenuiscapum
intro: Hieracium peleterianum subsp. tenuiscapum, commonly known as a type of hawkweed, is a plant species known for its medicinal properties. The health benefits of Hieracium peleterianum subsp. tenuiscapum include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in wound healing and the treatment of infections. The therapeutic actions of this plant are attributed to its bioactive constituents, such as flavonoids and phenolic acids, which exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities. However, I couldn't find specific information on its bioactive constituents.
